requirements.summary: Enroll a child tied to an affiliated Site__c with site-specific fields (country, coordinator, program level) and child fields (school year, favorite subject, hobbies)
requirements.source_quote: Create a new child record tied to an affiliated site (use a custom object Site__c). Show site-specific fields (country, site coordinator, program level) on the Site object. Child record should include fields for current school year, favorite subject and hobbies/interests.

requirements.summary: Complete a sponsorship: donor selects available child, creates monthly Recurring Gift (Gift Commitment), auto-links to child record, 1:1 donor-to-child
requirements.source_quote: Show a donor selecting an available child → creating a Recurring Gift (monthly) → auto-linking to the child record. Emphasize the 1:1 donor-to-child relationship.

requirements.summary: Cancel a Recurring Gift with a reason code, triggering a task for the program team
requirements.source_quote: Demonstrate closing a Recurring Gift with a reason code, triggering a task for the program team.

requirements.summary: Substitution/Transfer: re-link an existing donor to a new child when the original child leaves the program (transfer pain point)
requirements.source_quote: Show how a donor is re-linked to a new child when the original child leaves the program — this directly addresses their pain point of easy transfers when a child leaves.

requirements.summary: Correspondence tracking object linked to each child with status picklist: In-House → In Process → Ready to Send
requirements.source_quote: Show a custom (or configured) correspondence record linked to each child — tracking letters and photos with a status picklist: In-House → In Process → Ready to Send.

requirements.summary: Flow auto-notifies site coordinators when correspondence is overdue (e.g., 30 days before due); notification surfaces in Experience Cloud portal
requirements.source_quote: Use a Flow to auto-notify site coordinators when a correspondence item is overdue or missing (e.g., letter not received 30 days before due date). Show the notification landing in their Experience Cloud portal.

requirements.summary: Cross-site dashboard / list view of correspondence items by status
requirements.source_quote: A list view or report showing all items by status across sites — so staff can see at a glance what's in-house, in process, or ready for donors.

requirements.summary: Site Volunteer Experience Cloud portal: coordinators login, see letters due, submit letters and photos; submitted letters require approval before sharing via Experience Cloud to the Sponsor
requirements.source_quote: Show coordinators logging in, seeing letters due, submitting new letters and photos directly. The submitted letters should be approved before they can be shared via Experience Cloud to the Sponsor.

requirements.summary: Sponsor Experience Cloud portal: sponsor sees current sponsorship, child's letter, and recurring gift transaction history
requirements.source_quote: Show a sponsor logging in to see their current sponsorship and the letter that is from their child. The Sponsor portal should also show a history of their recurring gift transactions.

requirements.summary: Donor record shows rich Notes / 'Donor Development' related list capturing bequest intentions, capacity ratings, communication preferences, relationship history (Steve Mitchell - bequests + audit)
requirements.source_quote: Show a donor record with detailed Notes or a custom "Donor Development" related list — capturing bequest intentions, capacity ratings, communication preferences, and relationship history.

requirements.summary: Restricted vs unrestricted funds: GAUs tag gifts to support audit and monthly close
requirements.source_quote: Demonstrate General Accounting Units (GAUs) in NPSP/Nonprofit Cloud to tag gifts as restricted or unrestricted — directly supporting their audit requirements and monthly close process.

requirements.summary: Financial rollups: soft credit, gift summaries, monthly close totals per site + child-specific on a report
requirements.source_quote: Show soft credit rollups, gift summaries, and how the monthly close totals (per site + child-specific gifts) can be surfaced on a report.

requirements.summary: Sponsorship support details with editable paid-through dates and rates
requirements.source_quote: Highlight that paid-through dates and rates are editable, addressing their explicit requirement.

requirements.summary: Site coordinator uploads child's letter and photo via Experience Cloud; content saves to child record as Salesforce Files
requirements.source_quote: Show a site coordinator uploading a child's letter and photo through the volunteer portal → content saves directly to the child's Salesforce record as Salesforce Files.

requirements.summary: Marketing Director (Rachel) accesses child's Files tab, filters by content type / date / site without manual download or export
requirements.source_quote: Show Rachel logging into Salesforce (or a staff Experience Cloud page) and accessing the child's Files tab — filtering by content type, date, or site — without needing a manual download/export.

requirements.summary: MCAE integration: approved photos/content tagged and used in MCAE marketing emails / nurture journeys (e.g., 'meet your sponsored child' email auto-pulls photo and bio)
requirements.source_quote: Show how approved photos and content can be tagged and used to populate marketing emails or nurture journeys in MCAE — e.g., a "meet your sponsored child" email to a new donor that pulls in the child's photo and bio automatically.

requirements.summary: Donor-facing Sponsorship Portal shows child's letters and progress reports (re-states REQ-009 from a different angle)
requirements.source_quote: Show donors logging into the Sponsorship Portal to see the child's letters and progress reports — addressing their stated desire for portal visibility.
